violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary when changing gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Scoop handles were stored in the pizza toppings.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The handle on the walk in freezer is due for deep cleaning.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Observed drink ice in the handwashing sink.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
